name: [Gmail] Shortlisting Insights Fetcher
description: Monitors Gmail replies to VA candidate shortlisting emails, summarizes the client’s response in one sentence using AI, and appends the update to the matching ongoing Placement Requirement record in Airtable.

filters.q: subject: Scale Virtually: VA Candidates for

parameters.text:
=Summarize the following email into exactly one sentence.

Constraints:

Use a third-person perspective.

Extract the sender's first name from the From field below and use it as the subject of the sentence (e.g., "John mentioned...").

Do not include greetings (Hi, Good day) or signatures.

Focus on the core message.

Sender: {{ $json.From }} Snippet: {{ $json.snippet }}

values.content:
